report.summary: Built two SEO-optimized learn guides covering Crypto DCA Strategy (with deep internal linking to /tools/dca-calculator) and TradFi-DeFi Convergence 2026 (institutional adoption, tokenized RWAs, permissioned DeFi) — both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Crypto DCA Strategy — backtested $10/week BTC DCA from 2019-2024 returned 202%, Monday DCA accumulates 14.36% more BTC, fear-based contrarian DCA returned 1,145% (2018-2025), Fear & Greed Index at 11 in Q1 2026 (near all-time low of 5)

Topic 2: TradFi-DeFi Convergence — tokenized RWAs tripled to $18.5B in 2025, projected $50B+ in 2026, JPMorgan Onyx processing $1B/day in tokenized payments, BlackRock BUIDL holds $1.3B in tokenized treasuries, institutional crypto investments projected to surpass $500B in 2026

Gap analysis: No existing DCA strategy learn guide despite /tools/dca-calculator existing (high-value internal linking opportunity), no TradFi-DeFi convergence guide despite being the top institutional narrative of 2026
Sources: CoinGecko, dcaBTC, SpotedCrypto (backtested data), Grayscale Digital Asset Outlook, Elliptic, WEF, Finextra, CoinDesk

sections.title: Content Created
items: /learn/crypto-dca-strategy-guide-2026 — ~3,200 words, Beginner level, covers: DCA explained, why DCA works for crypto (volatility table), DCA vs lump sum with scenario data, optimal frequency & Monday effect, backtested returns table (BTC/ETH/SOL/SPY), advanced strategies (fear-based DCA, value-averaging, dip-enhanced), portfolio allocation templates, platform comparison table, 9 common mistakes, 6-question FAQ, CTA to DCA Calculator

/learn/tradfi-defi-convergence-guide-2026 — ~3,400 words, Intermediate level, covers: convergence definition, 4 catalysts making 2026 the inflection point, tokenized RWA breakdown by category ($50B opportunity), institutional player profiles (JPMorgan/BlackRock/Goldman/Citi), permissioned vs permissionless DeFi comparison, impact on retail users (good + concerning), investment opportunities table, bull/bear case analysis, 5-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: DCA guide title: 'Crypto DCA Strategy Guide 2026: Dollar-Cost Average Bitcoin & Alts | degen0x' (targets: crypto DCA strategy 2026, dollar cost averaging bitcoin, DCA crypto guide)
TradFi guide title: 'TradFi-DeFi Convergence 2026: How Institutions Are Going On-Chain | degen0x' (targets: TradFi DeFi convergence 2026, institutional crypto adoption, tokenized real world assets)
Both pages: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema JSON-LD structured data via combineSchemas()
Both pages: OpenGraph (type: article, publishedTime, images) + Twitter card + canonical URL metadata

DCA guide internal links: /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/fear-greed-timeline, /tools/alerts-dashboard, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /tools/exchange-fees, /tools/pnl-calculator, /exchanges, /learn (7 internal links)

TradFi guide internal links: /learn/onchain-finance-onfi-guide, /learn/genius-act-stablecoin-guide, /learn/crypto-regulation-global, /learn/rwa-tokenization-guide-2026, /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026, /learn/aave-v4-guide, /learn/ondo-finance-rwa-guide, /learn/tokenomics-protocol-revenue-guide, /learn/mev-guide-2026, /tools/onchain-analytics, /tools/defi-yields (11 internal links)
